name: harness-ux-fixes
title: Harness UX fixes: summary section population + source_todo auto-populate
description: Two independent fixes: (1) Fix validate-summary.sh firing every session because summary.md agent-written sections are never populated (T11), and (2) auto-populate source_todo in definition.yaml when starting work from a todos.yaml entry (T12).
